name: College Station, Texas
label: Texas A&M University / Doctoral formation
summary: Ph.D. in Biochemistry under Dorothy Shippen, focusing on telomere biology.

name: Bethesda, Maryland

summary: Postdoctoral research with Kiyoshi Mizuuchi at NIH, advancing toward DNA recombination studies.

name: New York, New York

summary: Professor in the Department of Biochemistry and Molecular Biophysics, establishing the Greene Lab and pioneering single-molecule imaging techniques.
